universe_name: Top-500-first U.S.-listed common stock coverage universe
coverage_purpose: Operational coverage metadata for deterministic MVP stock support scope and tests.
policy_note: Manifest membership and rank are not investment merit, not an endorsement, not a recommendation, not a model portfolio, and not personalized suitability.
rank_basis: Deterministic launch-universe fixture rank used for coverage ordering only; external provider inputs may inform refreshes, but this manifest is the runtime source of truth.
source_provenance: Local deterministic MVP fixture derived from project launch-universe planning; no live provider query is used at runtime.
